summary: C1/C3/C4 pass (gate correct, off-path single-loop, lensScores additive, full suite 1588/3 green). C2 FAIL: no test asserts the selected approach == synthesize().winner — only call-count + peak concurrency are tested. Implementation calls synthesize() correctly and threads the winner; the verifying assertion is missing.
feedback: Add a test that verifies the selected approach equals synthesize(approaches, lensScores).winner. Option A (preferred): add an additive optional selectedApproach?: string to ArchitectResult, populate it in runArchitectPanel with synthesisResult.winner, and assert result.selectedApproach === synthesize(sameApproaches, sameScores).winner. Option B: capture loopSpy.mock.calls[N+1] (the continuation call) and assert its userMessage contains the synthesize() winner. Keep all C1/C3/C4 tests green.
